channel.title: strip on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in strip on IT notes

item.title: rust strip
item.description: To build && strip a binary use: RUSTFLAGS='-C link-arg=-s' cargo build --release strip removes or modifies the symbol table attached to the output of the assembler and link editor. This is useful to save space after a program has been debugged and to limit dynamically bound symbols.
